questions.question: What does Vue do during hydration that differs from a normal SPA mount?
options: It re-renders all components from scratch to ensure consistency
It reuses existing server-rendered DOM nodes instead of creating new ones
It downloads a separate hydration bundle from the server
It runs SSR a second time on the client to verify correctness

questions.question: Which function should you use on the client for an SSR application instead of `createApp`?
What causes a hydration mismatch warning in Vue?
options: The client would render different HTML than what the server sent
